channel.title: +०९ on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +०९ on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Flights of fancy
item.description: Source: here. The black basaltic rock had assumed the delightful shape of a large throne, fit for a mighty rakSha like atikAya, who was slain by the saumitra. It was a cool refugium in the hot plains baked by the eye of mitra and varuNa, a far cry from its origins as a magmatic upwelling from the innards of the Earth around the time of the final demise of the non-avian dinosaurs.

item.title: The Satmala adventures
item.description: Source: here. 1) Chandvad (Chandradityapura) 2) Chandvad fort 3) chandreshvarI cave temple 4) reNukA temple 5) indrANI temple 6) indragiri durga (Indrai fort) 7) Koldher fort 8)Rajdher fort After a long bus journey the shUdra, the feral brahmin, Mis-creant and myself entrenched ourselves in the lodge of the lATas. After enjoying a sumptous ghee-rich meal that in our youth we could eat without much thought we proceeded by means of the second bus to middle of nowhere town/village of Chandvad.

item.title: The split forces and the pralApa
item.description: Source: here. The muni and me were in a sense like branches of the same tree. We wondered what might have happened if only the muni and me could have joined our forces on the battle field. Our coordination on the field was unmatched. We saw eye-to-eye in the conduct of campaigns and the like. The only difference was that we matured at different times. I grabbed the vidyAs when they had to be acquired, but the muni ambulated in a random walk for long before he achieved them.
